templates.name: action
templates.title: Action (Popup)
templates.description: Action popup example. Opens a toolbar popup with a simple page.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Click the toolbar icon to open the action popup
Edit src/action/index.html and watch HMR update the popup
useCases: Toolbar popup as the primary UI surface
Quick actions that don't need a full sidebar or page
Starting point for popup-based browser extensions

templates.name: action-locales
templates.title: Action Locales
templates.description: Action popup example demonstrating i18n with _locales and message placeholders.

templates.name: ai-chatgpt
templates.title: ChatGPT AI Sidebar
templates.description: React sidebar with ChatGPT chat. Adds a side panel with a conversational interface powered by the OpenAI SDK.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any web page and click the extension icon to open the sidebar
Enter your ChatGPT API key (from platform.openai.com)
Ask ChatGPT about the active tab — the content script feeds the page text into the conversation
useCases: Chat with the active tab's content using ChatGPT
Summarize or question articles, docs, and dashboards in place
Starting point for page-aware ChatGPT extensions

templates.name: ai-claude
templates.title: Claude AI Sidebar
templates.description: React sidebar with Claude AI chat. Adds a side panel with a conversational interface powered by the Anthropic SDK.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any web page and click the extension icon to open the sidebar
Enter your Claude API key (from console.anthropic.com)
Ask Claude about the active tab — the content script feeds the page text into the conversation
useCases: Chat with the active tab's content using Claude
Summarize or question articles, docs, and dashboards in place
Starting point for page-aware Claude extensions

templates.name: ai-gemini
templates.title: Gemini AI Sidebar
templates.description: React sidebar with Gemini chat. Adds a side panel with a conversational interface powered by the Google Generative AI SDK.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any web page and click the extension icon to open the sidebar
Enter your Gemini API key (from aistudio.google.com)
Ask Gemini about the active tab — the content script feeds the page text into the conversation
useCases: Chat with the active tab's content using Gemini
Summarize or question articles, docs, and dashboards in place
Starting point for page-aware Gemini extensions

templates.name: ai-perplexity
templates.title: Perplexity AI Sidebar
templates.description: React sidebar with Perplexity chat. Adds a side panel with a conversational interface powered by the Perplexity API (OpenAI-compatible).
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any web page and click the extension icon to open the sidebar
Enter your Perplexity API key (from perplexity.ai/settings/api)
Ask Perplexity about the active tab — the content script feeds the page text into the conversation
useCases: Chat with the active tab's content using Perplexity
Summarize or question articles, docs, and dashboards in place
Starting point for page-aware Perplexity extensions

templates.name: @extension-js/content
templates.title: Content scripts
templates.description: Content script example that injects a small badge into web pages to demonstrate DOM injection and styling in an extension.

templates.name: @extension-js/content-css-modules
templates.title: Content CSS Modules
templates.description: Content script example styled with CSS Modules. Injects a small badge and shows how to scope styles in content scripts.

templates.name: content-custom-font
templates.title: Content Custom Font
templates.description: Content script example that loads custom web fonts. Demonstrates font files and web_accessible_resources setup.

templates.name: content-env
templates.title: Content Env
templates.description: Content script example that reads environment variables (.env) and renders a small UI.

templates.name: @extension-js/content-less
templates.title: Content Less
templates.description: Content script example styled with Less. Injects a small badge and shows how to organize styles with Less in content scripts.

templates.name: @extension-js/content-less-modules
templates.title: Content Less Modules
templates.description: Content script example using Less with CSS Modules. Injects a small badge and shows how to scope Less styles in content scripts.

templates.name: content-main-world
templates.title: Main-world Content Script
templates.description: Main world content script with multiple groups. ISOLATED entries precede the MAIN world entry so bridge injection exercises canonical-index vs array-position resolution.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any page and watch the main-world script run alongside isolated entries
Inspect window.postMessage bridges between isolated and main worlds
useCases: Hook into page-level globals that isolated content scripts cannot reach
Bridge isolated and main-world execution contexts cleanly
Reference for multi-group content_scripts in MV3

templates.name: content-multi-one-entry
templates.title: Content Multi One Entry
templates.description: Content script example with four scripts listed in one entry. Each script injects a small element.

templates.name: content-multi-three-entries
templates.title: Multi-entry Content Scripts
templates.description: Content script example split across three entries (2 + 1 + 1). Each script injects a small element.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open any page — three separate content scripts inject small elements
Edit any of the entries in src/content/ to see HMR update independently
useCases: Split content-script logic across multiple entries with different match rules
Target different page contexts with focused, independent bundles
Reference for the multi-entry content_scripts pattern in MV3

templates.name: content-preact
templates.title: Content Preact
templates.description: Content script example rendered with Preact. Mounts a small UI inside a Shadow DOM on any page.

templates.name: content-react
templates.title: Content React
templates.description: Content script example rendered with React. Mounts a small UI inside a Shadow DOM on any page.

templates.name: @extension-js/content-sass
templates.title: Content Sass
templates.description: Content script example styled with Sass. Injects a small badge and shows how to organize styles with Sass in content scripts.

templates.name: @extension-js/content-sass-modules
templates.title: Content Sass Modules
templates.description: A browser extension content script example built with Extension.js using Sass CSS Modules. Demonstrates scoped styles for content scripts with Sass preprocessing.

templates.name: content-svelte
templates.title: Content Svelte
templates.description: Content script example rendered with Svelte. Mounts a small UI inside a Shadow DOM on any page.

templates.name: content-typescript
templates.title: Content TypeScript
templates.description: Content script example built with TypeScript. Mounts a small UI and uses typed modules.

templates.name: content-vue
templates.title: Content Vue
templates.description: Content script example rendered with Vue. Mounts a small UI inside a Shadow DOM on any page.

templates.name: init
templates.title: Initial
templates.description: A basic browser extension example built with Extension.js. A starting point for developers learning current browser extension tooling.

templates.name: javascript
templates.title: JavaScript
templates.description: JavaScript-based extension with a sidebar panel. Adds a sidebar with a simple page.

templates.name: new
templates.title: Newtab
templates.description: New tab page example using plain JavaScript. Renders a simple page you can customize.

templates.name: new-browser-flags
templates.title: Newtab Browser Flags
templates.description: A browser extension example built with Extension.js demonstrating browser-specific features and flags. Shows how to handle browser differences across targets.

templates.name: new-config-eslint
templates.title: Newtab Config ESLint
templates.description: New tab page example with ESLint configured. Shows how linting is set up in an extension project.

templates.name: new-config-prettier
templates.title: Newtab Config Prettier
templates.description: New tab page example with Prettier configured. Shows how formatting is set up in an extension project.

templates.name: new-config-stylelint
templates.title: Newtab Config Stylelint
templates.description: New tab page example with Stylelint configured. Shows how CSS linting is set up in an extension project.

templates.name: new-crypto
templates.title: Newtab Crypto
templates.description: New tab page example demonstrating basic crypto operations inside an extension.

templates.name: new-env
templates.title: Environment Variables
templates.description: New tab page example demonstrating environment variables (.env) in an extension project.
firstSteps: Copy .env.example to .env and edit the values
Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Open a new tab — the page reads injected EXTENSION_PUBLIC_* values
useCases: Inject build-time configuration without leaking secrets
Switch behavior per browser, mode, or deployment target
Reference for safe env-var usage across JS, JSON, and HTML

templates.name: new-less
templates.title: Newtab Less
templates.description: New tab page example styled with Less. Renders a simple page and organizes styles with Less.

templates.name: new-preact
templates.title: Newtab Preact
templates.description: New tab page example rendered with Preact. Loads a small Preact app you can extend.

templates.name: new-react
templates.title: Newtab React
templates.description: A browser extension new tab page example built with Extension.js and React. Demonstrates a React-based new tab page with a working build and preview flow.

templates.name: new-react-router
templates.title: Newtab React Router
templates.description: New tab page example using React Router. Shows multiple routes inside the new tab app.

templates.name: new-sass
templates.title: Newtab Sass
templates.description: New tab page example styled with Sass. Renders a simple page and organizes styles with Sass.

templates.name: new-svelte
templates.title: Newtab Svelte
templates.description: New tab page example rendered with Svelte. Loads a small Svelte app you can extend.

templates.name: new-typescript
templates.title: Newtab TypeScript
templates.description: A browser extension new tab page example built with Extension.js and TypeScript. Demonstrates a type-safe new tab page with a working build and preview flow.

templates.name: new-vue
templates.title: Newtab Vue
templates.description: New tab page example rendered with Vue. Loads a small Vue app you can extend.

templates.name: playwright
templates.title: Playwright E2E Sidebar
templates.description: Sidebar extension example demonstrating Playwright-driven E2E automation.
firstSteps: Run npm install to set up Playwright deps
Run npm run dev to launch the extension
Run npm test to execute the Playwright spec against the loaded extension
useCases: End-to-end testing for browser-extension surfaces (popup, sidebar, content)
CI-ready Playwright setup wired to Extension.js builds
Reference for automating extension flows in headed and headless modes

templates.name: preact
templates.title: Preact
templates.description: Preact-based extension with a sidebar panel. Adds a sidebar with a simple page.

templates.name: react
templates.title: React
templates.description: React-based extension with a sidebar panel. Adds a sidebar with a simple page.

templates.name: sidebar
templates.title: Sidebar page
templates.description: Sidebar panel example. Adds a sidebar to the browser with a simple page.

templates.name: sidebar-antd
templates.title: Sidebar Ant Design
templates.description: React sidebar using antd and @ant-design/x. Regression coverage for issue #445.

templates.name: sidebar-monorepo-turbopack
templates.title: Sidebar Turbopack
templates.description: Monorepo example with content script and sidebar.

templates.name: sidebar-shadcn
templates.title: Sidebar shadcn
templates.description: React sidebar example using shadcn/ui components. Adds a sidebar panel with a simple React page.

templates.name: special-folders-pages
templates.title: Special Folders: pages/
templates.description: Opens a welcome page on extension load, showcasing the pages/ folder.
firstSteps: Run npm run dev to launch the extension
A welcome page from src/pages/ opens automatically on install
Add another HTML file under src/pages/ — it ships as a separate page
useCases: Onboarding, help, and welcome pages that ship with the extension
Standalone HTML routes without manifest plumbing
Reference for Extension.js's pages/ special folder convention

templates.name: special-folders-scripts
templates.title: Special Folders Scripts
templates.description: Demonstrates scripts/ folder organization and how to run standalone scripts via the extension.

templates.name: svelte
templates.title: Svelte
templates.description: Svelte-based extension with a sidebar panel. Adds a sidebar with a simple page.

templates.title: Transformers.js

templates.description: TypeScript-based extension with a sidebar panel. Adds a sidebar with a simple page.
